title: Feather BE
description: A clean blue-themed panorama inspired by Feather Client, giving Minecraft a calm and modern main menu look.
body:
BlueXpanorma is a simple and clean texture pack that replaces the default Minecraft main menu panorama with a blue-themed Feather Client–inspired background.
This pack is designed for players who like a minimal, modern, and smooth UI feel without changing gameplay or other textures. The blue color palette gives a calm and premium look while keeping the vanilla style intact.



✨ Features
Blue-themed main menu panorama
Inspired by Feather Client–style simplicity
Lightweight and performance-friendly
Works with vanilla Minecraft
Compatible with most clients and launchers



🎯 Perfect For
Players who want a clean UI
Feather-style aesthetics without using a client
Custom launchers or menu mods (FancyMenu, etc.)
This pack only changes the panorama and does not affect gameplay or textures.
